title: Tenant Configuration
description: Per-tenant configuration that connects the doc-hub engine to a specific Google Workspace shared drive and brand pack. Lives in the tenant's Drive root, never in the engine repo.

tenantId.description: Unique identifier for this tenant (e.g. 'kuill'). Used as prefix in Registry created_by entries.

sharedDriveId.description: Google Shared Drive ID (the root of DOC HUB).

brandKitFolderId.description: Drive folder ID containing brand-tokens.json, logos, and master templates.

registrySheetId.description: Google Sheets file ID for the Document-Registry spreadsheet.

auditTrailSheetId.description: Google Sheets file ID for the Audit-Trail spreadsheet.

manifestSheetId.description: Google Sheets file ID for the _manifest spreadsheet (template catalog).

importsFolderId.description: Drive folder ID for _Imports/ — landing zone for files uploaded from outside the system.

trashFolderId.description: Drive folder ID for _Trash/ — soft-deleted docs live here before TTL purge.

snapshotsFolderName.description: Name of the Snapshots subfolder created inside each domain folder.

archiveFolderName.description: Name of the Archive subfolder created inside each domain folder.

adminEmail.description: Email of the tenant admin. Receives linter reports and critical alerts.

notifyEmail.description: Email for operational notifications (defaults to adminEmail if omitted).

docTtlDays.description: Days before a soft-deleted doc is permanently purged.

snapshotTtlDays.description: Days before a soft-deleted snapshot PDF is permanently purged.

lock.description: Soft lock configuration for concurrent edit protection.

defaultTtlMinutes.description: Default lock TTL in minutes. Locks auto-expire after this time.

orphanWarningDays.description: Flag files in _Imports/ that haven't been adopted after this many days.

duplicateLevenshteinThreshold.description: Max Levenshtein edit distance between two filenames in the same folder before they are flagged as possible duplicates. Lower = stricter.

forbiddenNamePatterns.description: Regex patterns in filenames that trigger a naming violation.

webAppUrl.description: Deployed Apps Script Web App URL. Set after first clasp deploy.
